title: nomadkit
description: a datapack specifically for Nomad Style modpack
body:
A datapack made for my Nomad Style modpack.
- Breaking campfire without silktouch will now drop campfire.
- Crafting campfire become easy.
- Give starter kit when first join.
- Custom skill tree for [Pufferfish's Skills](https://modrinth.com/mod/skills) Mod.
